### DOM Fields

- 1. LGW - Gatwick (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_enabled_depos[]`
  - Model field: Enabled Depos / `enabled_depos` / SelectMultiple
- 2. BRS - Bristol (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_enabled_depos[]`
  - Model field: Enabled Depos / `enabled_depos` / SelectMultiple
- 3. IPW - Ipswitch (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_enabled_depos[]`
  - Model field: Enabled Depos / `enabled_depos` / SelectMultiple
- 4. GLA - Coatbridge (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_enabled_depos[]`
  - Model field: Enabled Depos / `enabled_depos` / SelectMultiple
- 5. NCL - Gateshead (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_enabled_depos[]`
  - Model field: Enabled Depos / `enabled_depos` / SelectMultiple
- 6. ORM - Northampton (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_enabled_depos[]`
  - Model field: Enabled Depos / `enabled_depos` / SelectMultiple
- 7. Fetch Extended Dates? (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_extended_dates`
  - Model field: Fetch Extended Dates? / `extended_dates` / Checkbox
- 8. Minimum delivery day optional (number)

### DOM Fields

- 1. Max Days (number)
  - DOM name: `setting_max_days`
  - Model field: Max Days / `max_days` / Int
  - Screenshot: pages/176-cp-shipping-wincanton-settings-admin-ae622c90/images/field-001-max-days.png
- 2. Minimum delivery day optional (number)
  - DOM name: `setting_min_delivery_day`
  - Model field: Minimum delivery day / `min_delivery_day` / Int
  - Screenshot: pages/176-cp-shipping-wincanton-settings-admin-ae622c90/images/field-002-minimum-delivery-day-optional.png
- 3. Maximum delivery day optional (number)
  - DOM name: `setting_max_delivery_day`
  - Model field: Maximum delivery day / `max_delivery_day` / Int
  - Screenshot: pages/176-cp-shipping-wincanton-settings-admin-ae622c90/images/field-003-maximum-delivery-day-optional.png
- 4. Date Cutoff Start optional (date)
  - DOM name: `setting_date_cutoff_start`
  - Model field: Date Cutoff Start / `date_cutoff_start` / Date
  - Screenshot: pages/176-cp-shipping-wincanton-settings-admin-ae622c90/images/field-004-date-cutoff-start-optional.png
- 5. Date Cutoff End optional (date)
  - DOM name: `setting_date_cutoff_end`
  - Model field: Date Cutoff End / `date_cutoff_end` / Date
  - Screenshot: pages/176-cp-shipping-wincanton-settings-admin-ae622c90/images/field-005-date-cutoff-end-optional.png
- 6. Fixed ISO Country Code optional (text)
  - DOM name: `setting_fixed_iso_country_code`
  - Model field: Fixed ISO Country Code / `fixed_iso_country_code` / Text
  - Screenshot: pages/176-cp-shipping-wincanton-settings-admin-ae622c90/images/field-006-fixed-iso-country-code-optional.png
- 7. Notify WMS on Export Failure (checkbox)
  - DOM name: `setting_notify_wms_failures`
  - Model field: Notify WMS on Export Failure / `notify_wms_failures` / Checkbox
